items.title: Turkey reassures Brits tourism is 'proceeding as normal' - with every hotel 'operating as planned'
items.deck: Turkish tourism officials confirmed that hotels, resorts, excursions and attractions are 'proceeding as normal', with all UK flights to and from Turkish airports departing on schedule.

items.title: Warehouse worker sacked for faking bad back when boss found videos of him performing as reggae DJ wins £30,000 unfair dismissal payout
items.deck: Neil Wilson, also known by his stage name Reggae Vibes, was awarded the payout after facing accusations he defrauded insurers while being off sick from his day job.

items.deck: Generate Biomedicines IPO highlights AI-driven drug discovery, strong backing, promising pipeline, and investor confidence signals.
